CustomObject.description: Admin-configurable giving-level definition (e.g. Congressional, Senate). Each record sets a name, an inclusive Minimum and exclusive Maximum yearly-giving amount, a sort rank, an active flag, and an optional Engagement Plan Template to launch when a donor reaches the level. Drives the Annual Giving Summary level engine. JSI-90 Moves Management. Author: Jason Ott.
CustomObject.label: Giving Level
